title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Finolex Industries Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Finolex Industries Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Finolex Industries Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Bhubaneswar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Finolex Industries Advisory Limited:
Finolex Industries Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Finolex Industries Advisory Limited!
